input.headline: ‘We could have asked ChatGPT’: students fight back over course taught by AI

raw.headline: ‘We could have asked ChatGPT’: students fight back over course taught by AI

winner: Why did the AI professor refuse a debate with the students? Because it didn't want to risk getting out-voted in its own class!

candidates.text: Why did the student bring a broom to class? To sweep the floor after their human teacher got replaced by ChatGPT!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant and uses a common object (broom) in a surprising way, but the humor is weak and lacks specificity to the headline's context."}

candidates.text: Why did the AI professor refuse a debate with the students? Because it didn't want to risk getting out-voted in its own class!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant and uses a play on 'out-voted,' but it lacks specificity and the surprise element is weak. The setup could be more engaging."}

candidates.text: Why did the AI professor decide to grade on a curve? To ensure fairness in the class, even if some students were programmed to perform better.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant and uses a play on 'programmed to perform better,' but it lacks surprise and feels a bit forced. The setup could be more engaging."}

candidates.text: Why did the professor decide to enroll in a class taught by a student? Because he heard they were exceptional at fighting back against AI!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks surprise and specificity. It also feels a bit forced in its connection to the topic."}

candidates.text: Why did the student bring a broom to class? To sweep away the artificial intelligence!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks surprise and specificity; 'broom' and 'sweep away AI' is a common metaphor, making it generic rather than clever."}
